auth.login_subtitle: Sign in to manage your finances
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.forgotPasswordSuccess: If an account exists with this email, you will receive a reset link.

errors.password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters

landing.heroSubtitle: Track, analyze, and optimize your spending with real-time insights. Connect your accounts or use our Telegram bot for instant logging.

dashboard.title: Know your position in 3 seconds
dashboard.description: See your exact balance, income, and expenses the moment you open the app. No digging through menus.

transactions.title: Every transaction, perfectly organized
transactions.description: Log expenses in seconds. Filter by date, type, or category to find exactly what you need.

analytics.title: Understand where your money goes
analytics.description: Interactive charts show your spending patterns over time. Spot trends before they become problems.

ai_insights.title: Get smarter about your money
ai_insights.description: Personalized recommendations help you save more and spend smarter. No financial advisor needed.

categories.title: Automatic organization
categories.description: Categories sort themselves. Create custom ones for complete control over how you track.

telegram.title: Log expenses without opening the app
telegram.description: Send a message like 'Coffee $5' to our bot. It's tracked instantly. Zero friction.

telegram_section.title:
Track expenses directly
from Telegram
telegram_section.description: Log transactions on the go with FlowrBot. Just send a message like "Coffee $5" and it's tracked automatically. No app opening required.

cta.title: Start tracking your money in 30 seconds
cta.subtitle: Free forever. No credit card needed. Just sign up and take control.

dashboard.greetingSubtitle: Here's your financial overview for this month.
dashboard.noTransactionsDesc: Start tracking your finances by adding your first transaction.
dashboard.errorDesc: We couldn't load your dashboard data. Please try again.
dashboard.welcomeSubtitle: Start tracking your finances by adding your first transaction.
dashboard.emptyOverviewDesc: Your financial overview will appear here once you start adding transactions.

insights.title: AI Insights
insights.empty: No insights available yet. Start adding transactions to get personalized recommendations.

mom_increase.title: Spending increased
mom_increase.message: You spent {{percentage}}% more this month compared to last month.

mom_decrease.title: Spending decreased
mom_decrease.message: Great job! You spent {{percentage}}% less this month compared to last month.

top_category.title: Top spending category
top_category.message: {{category}} represents {{percentage}}% of your total expenses this month.

no_income.title: No income registered
no_income.message: You haven't registered any income this month. Add your income to track your savings rate.

good_savings.title: Great savings rate
good_savings.message: You're saving {{rate}}% of your income this month. Keep it up!

negative_savings.title: Spending more than earning
negative_savings.message: Your expenses exceed your income this month. Review your spending to get back on track.

messages.mom_increase: Your expenses went up {{percentage}}% compared to last month
messages.mom_decrease: Your expenses went down {{percentage}}% compared to last month
messages.top_category: {{name}} represents {{percentage}}% of your expenses this month
messages.no_income: No income was registered this month. Check your income sources.
messages.negative_savings: You're spending {{rate}}% more than you earn this month
messages.high_concentration: {{percentage}}% of your expenses are concentrated in {{count}} categories
messages.period_trend: Compared to the previous period, your expenses {{direction}} by {{percentage}}%
